title: loncomelos bungei
parts: Loncomelos bungei has many medicinal parts, such as the roots, leaves, and stems. The roots of the Loncomelos bungei plant are known to contain compounds like flavonoids, alkaloids, and glycosides, which have been traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The leaves, on the other hand, are rich in saponins, sesquiterpenes, and phenolic acids, which have been used to treat various health issues including inflammation, digestive problems, and cardiovascular diseases. The stems of the plant contain terpenoids, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which have been traditionally used to treat pain, fever, and respiratory issues.
side_effects: Loncomelos bungei can have side effects if used improperly, such as causing respiratory problems, including bronchitis and asthma attacks, due to the release of irritating chemicals into the air. Prolonged exposure to the plant's toxic compounds can also lead to skin irritation, including rashes and blisters, as well as eye inflammation and vision problems. In severe cases, improper use of loncomelos bungei can result in liver damage and kidney failure, requiring immediate medical attention. It is essential to handle the plant with caution and follow proper guidelines to avoid these potential side effects.
